summary: Send X-Airbnb-API-Key (and companion X-Airbnb-* headers) on every GraphQL request; scrape the key from homepage SSR with a constant fallback.
reason: Airbnb's GraphQL gateway rejects unauthenticated requests with `{error:"invalid_key", error_code:400}`. The original `graphQLGet` sent only `Accept: application/json` plus the cookie jar, so `StaysPdpBookItQuery`, `WishlistIndexPageQuery`, and `WishlistItemsAsyncQuery` all 400'd. Restoring the public web API key fixes the headline blocker for `cheapest`, `plan`, `compare`, and `watch`.
validated_outcome: Live `airbnb-listing get 18413186 --checkin ... --checkout ...` no longer returns the `invalid_key` error. The scraper falls back to the well-known constant `d306zoyjsyarp7ifhu67rjxn52tv0t20` if the homepage scrape fails (bot-block, network error).
